testcase.name: process_nullLevel_throwsAndRethrows
testcase.system-out: 19:54:01.206 [main] ERROR com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Failed to process log event payload: {eventId=732a342f-fd05-4474-ad7e-99e4e847a87a, level=null, serviceId=svc, message=test message, normalizedMessage=test message, timestamp=2026-03-31T14:24:01.173270900Z} java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Missing required field 'level' in log event payload at com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService.toLogEvent(DetectorService.java:99) at com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService.process(DetectorService.java:65) at testcase.name: process_errorsAboveThreshold_publishesAnomaly
testcase.system-out: 19:54:01.389 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:01.399 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:01.401 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=INFO, message=test message 19:54:01.404 [main] WARN com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- [svc] Anomaly detected by error-rate-spike: Error rate spike detected: 66.7% of last 3 events were errors (threshold: 50.0%) (value=0.6666666666666666, threshold=0.5)

testcase.name: process_missingTimestamp_fallsBackToNow
testcase.system-out: 19:54:01.645 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=INFO, message=test message

testcase.name: process_exceptionInOneCall_doesNotCorruptSubsequentCalls

testcase.name: process_unknownLevel_throwsAndRethrows
testcase.system-out: 19:54:01.995 [main] ERROR com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Failed to process log event payload: {eventId=faa573b7-eee1-4a2f-b3c7-5e948f2e4f05, level=VERBOSE, serviceId=svc, message=test message, normalizedMessage=test message, timestamp=2026-03-31T14:24:01.991546600Z} java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Unknown log level 'VERBOSE' in log event payload at com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService.toLogEvent(DetectorService.java:105) at com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService.process(DetectorService.java:65) at testcase.name: process_windowNotFull_noAnomalyYet
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.044 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.045 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=ERROR, message=test message

testcase.name: process_anomalyEvent_hasCorrectFields
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.085 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service payment-service: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.087 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service payment-service: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.088 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service payment-service: level=INFO, message=test message 19:54:02.092 [main] WARN com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- [payment-service] Anomaly detected by error-rate-spike: Error rate spike detected: 66.7% of last 3 events were errors (threshold: 50.0%) (value=0.6666666666666666, threshold=0.5)

testcase.name: process_timestampAsEpochMillis_parsedSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.157 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=INFO, message=test message

testcase.name: process_timestampAsIsoString_parsedSuccessfully
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.190 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=INFO, message=test message

testcase.name: process_allFatal_triggersAnomaly
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.214 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=FATAL, message=test message 19:54:02.221 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=FATAL, message=test message 19:54:02.231 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc: level=FATAL, message=test message 19:54:02.233 [main] WARN com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- [svc] Anomaly detected by error-rate-spike: Error rate spike detected: 100.0% of last 3 events were errors (threshold: 50.0%) (value=1.0, threshold=0.5)

testcase.name: process_differentServices_independentDetectors
testcase.system-out: 19:54:02.309 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-a: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.311 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-a: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.312 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-a: level=INFO, message=test message 19:54:02.315 [main] WARN com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- [svc-a] Anomaly detected by error-rate-spike: Error rate spike detected: 66.7% of last 3 events were errors (threshold: 50.0%) (value=0.6666666666666666, threshold=0.5) 19:54:02.318 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-b: level=ERROR, message=test message 19:54:02.321 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-b: level=INFO, message=test message 19:54:02.323 [main] INFO com.logpipeline.service.DetectorService -- Processing log event from service svc-b: level=INFO, message=test message
